functionEntry.name: onMenuItem
functionEntry.documentation:
Handle a menu item being selected
item Symbol identifier of the menu item that was chosen

functionEntry.name: onMenu
functionEntry.documentation:
Handle the menu event
Returns true if handled, false otherwise

functionEntry.name: onMenuItem
functionEntry.documentation:
Handle a menu item being selected
item Symbol identifier of the menu item that was chosen

functionEntry.name: onLayout
functionEntry.documentation:
Load your resources here
dc Device context

functionEntry.name: onHide
functionEntry.documentation:
Called when this View is removed from the screen. Save the
state of this View here. This includes freeing resources from
memory.

functionEntry.name: onShow
functionEntry.documentation:
Called when this View is brought to the foreground. Restore
the state of this View and prepare it to be shown. This includes
loading resources into memory.

functionEntry.name: onUpdate
functionEntry.documentation:
Update the view
dc Device context

functionEntry.name: onStart
functionEntry.documentation:
Handle app startup
state Startup arguments

functionEntry.name: getInitialView
functionEntry.documentation:
Return the initial views for the app
Returns Array Pair [View, InputDelegate]

functionEntry.name: onStop
functionEntry.documentation:
Handle app shutdown
state Shutdown arguments
